description: DOXII Component Library - Pre-built, tested components for e-commerce stores

components.name: Header Modern Nav
components.description: Modern navigation header with mobile menu, announcement bar, theme toggle, and CTA buttons
features: mobile hamburger menu with slide animation
shopping cart icon with item count badge

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, gradient announcement bar, button styles
customization_points.content: Brand name, announcement, navigation items, CTA labels, cart count

components.name: Header Animated Hover
components.description: Navigation header with animated slide-up hover effect on menu items, glassmorphic design
features: unique animated slide-up hover effect on nav links
dual CTA buttons with different styles
theme toggle with glow effect (dark mode)

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, glassmorphic effects, glow shadows
customization_points.content: Logo SVG, brand name, navigation items, CTA labels

components.name: Header Search Bar
components.description: E-commerce header with prominent search functionality, category dropdown, cart, and wishlist
features: prominent search bar with category dropdown
shopping cart icon with item count badge
wishlist icon with item count badge
functionality: search event with query and category

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, search bar styling, badge colors
customization_points.content: Brand name, categories, navigation items, cart/wishlist counts

components.name: Header Mega Menu
components.description: E-commerce header with dropdown mega menu showing categories with images and subcategories
features: mega menu dropdown with category grid

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, hover effects, shadow
customization_points.content: Categories with images, subcategories, navigation items

components.name: Header Minimal Logo
components.description: Simple, clean header with logo, minimal navigation, and essential actions

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, logo background, CTA button
customization_points.content: Brand name/logo, navigation items, CTA label, cart count

components.name: Product Detail Elite
components.description: Elegant product detail page with expandable accordion sections, perfect for furniture and home decor

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, border colors, background colors
customization_points.content: Product data with images, colors, pricing, and shipping info

components.name: Product Detail Fashion
components.description: Fashion-focused product page with comprehensive reviews, tabs, and rating distribution

customization_points.colors: Primary accent, theme colors, star ratings
customization_points.content: Product data with reviews and rating distribution

components.name: Product Detail Sports
components.description: Image-heavy product page with vertical thumbnail gallery and shipping calculator, ideal for sports and outdoor equipment

customization_points.colors: Primary blue theme, color swatches with gradients
customization_points.layout: Vertical thumbnail gallery with main image
customization_points.content: Product data with multiple images and shipping options

components.name: Product Detail Minimal
components.description: Clean and minimal product page with elegant typography and pill-style selectors, perfect for luxury and watch brands

customization_points.colors: Primary accent (rose/coral), neutral grays, elegant palette
customization_points.content: Product data with material specifications

components.name: Hero AI Geometric
components.description: Dark hero section with geometric SVG patterns, mobile menu, community badge, and dual CTAs

customization_points.colors: Dark background with geometric patterns, theme colors
customization_points.layout: Navigation items, hero content layout, community badge
customization_points.content: Brand name, community stats, hero title, subtitle, CTA text, navigation items, hero images

components.name: Hero Nav Showcase
components.description: Modern hero section with fixed navigation, mobile menu toggle, dual CTAs, and large product showcase image. Perfect for ecommerce landing pages.
features: responsive mobile menu with slide-in animation
large hero image with responsive sizing
functionality: mobile menu slide animation from left

customization_points.colors: Indigo primary color, slate text colors, theme-based backgrounds
customization_points.layout: Fixed navigation, two-column hero layout (mobile: single column)
customization_points.typography: Poppins font family from Google Fonts
customization_points.content: Logo (text + SVG), navigation items (JSON), CTAs, heading, subheading, hero image

components.name: Hero Grid Gradient Network
components.description: E-commerce hero section with grid pattern gradient background, mobile menu, app download CTAs, and social proof elements

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, gradient backgrounds, button styles
customization_points.layout: Navigation items, hero content layout, user avatars
customization_points.content: Brand name, navigation items, title, subtitle, CTA text, user images, rating

components.name: Hero Noise Creator
components.description: E-commerce hero section with noise background texture, centered layout, email signup form, and community badge
features: Berkshire Swash decorative font for title

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, background texture, button styles
customization_points.typography: Berkshire Swash for title, Poppins for body
customization_points.content: Brand name, badge text, title, subtitle, announcement, email placeholder

required_imports: Google Fonts: Berkshire Swash (auto-loaded from CDN)

components.name: Hero Animated Business
components.description: E-commerce hero section with animated navigation hover effects, gradient background, dual CTAs, and product image gallery
features: animated navigation with slide-up hover effect
gradient background (dark mode with SVG pattern)
product image gallery with hover effects

customization_points.colors: Theme colors, gradient backgrounds, glassmorphic effects
customization_points.layout: Navigation items, hero content, image gallery
customization_points.content: Brand logo, navigation, badge text, title, subtitle, CTA text, product images

components.name: Hero Leaders Industry

login and signup buttons in navigation

customization_points.content: Brand logo, navigation, badge, title, subtitle, CTA text, product images

components.name: Hero Centered Leaders

login and signup buttons in navigation
